metadata.title:
TWO WEEKS PROGRAM ---~42s :


FOR ]. Z. WHITES VISIT

pages.raw_text:
/ A two weeks program that will
make the forthcoming visit of John
z. White of Chicago, representing
the Henry George national lecture
bureau, one of the busiest of the
kind ever made to Spokane, has
been arranged by the friends OF, the
distinguished lecturer.


Mr.. White will arrive next Tires
day, December IA, at 10 a. IN. and
will speak at the following times
and places: -


Dec. Ia. 5 p. m, Spokane Equal
Suffrage club, basement of the Hut
ton building. - -.


Dec. Is, IL a. m, South Central
high school; p. m, Occur d'Alene
college at Occur d'Alene; 8 p, m,
the public of Occur d'Alene.


December 16. afternoon and EVEN
ing, Washington state college at
Pullman.


December II, 3 p. M, Blair Bust
ness college; s p. m, the charter
revision committee. =


December 10, at Rev. J. w. Kra-
mers pulpit, First Baptist church..
In the evening at some other
church yet to be selected. At 3 p.
m, Economic club. e~ -


Dec. 20, 9 a. m, Northwestern
Business college; 1880 p. M, Cens'
trail Labor union, on THE Dignity
of Labor"


December 81, afternoon and even-
ing, Cheney Normal. 81. n


December %, s p. m, first lee
ture before the Y. M. G. A. - ."


December %, IL a. m, Spokane
college; p. m, Carpenters union,
Madison street; subject, Govern
ment by Injunction" This, is an
open meeting.


December "a, luncheon by the
College Equal Suffrage club will be
given.


Dec 26, 8 p. m, Mr.. White will
again address the Economic club
on Land Value Taxation" In the
evening he will speak at the PHI
grim Congregational church, Rev.
Hindley's pulpit.


December 81, s p. M, Mr.. White
will address the Young Mems demo-
cratic club at the assembly room
of the chamber OF commerce, to
which meeting the Young Mems
Republican club has been invited.
AT 2 p. m. the same day he will
speak before the political economy
section of the Woman's club.
